Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=parabank, url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank, headers={'Accept': 'application/json'}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server
Creates an HTTP session for ParaBank API

kw.name: Get Customer Accounts
Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank/customers/12212/accounts path_url=/parabank/services/bank/customers/12212/accounts headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': 'application/json', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None

Adding certificate verification is strongly advised. See: https://urllib3.readthedocs.io/en/latest/advanced-usage.html#tls-warnings warnings.warn(
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.
Gets a list of accounts for a customer ID

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Create Account
kw.doc: Creates a new account for the customer via API

kw.name: Get Customer Accounts
kw.doc: Gets a list of accounts for a customer ID

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Convert To String
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a Unicode string.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
Loads target environment and fetch active account IDs

test.name: TC-AC-UI-02

kw.name: Open Application And Login
Open Application
Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
Opens browser and navigate to application page

kw.name: Login
Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
Logs in user
Opens application and logs in

kw.name: Click Open New Account
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
Clicks the open new account link

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Location Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Select Account Type
Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'xpath=//select[@id="type"]' by value 0.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
Selects account type (0 for Checking, 1 for Savings)

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Click Open Account Button
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
Clicks the open account button

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'Your new account number'.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Close Application
Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Closes the browser

test.doc: Verify creating checking account with default options
